IDENTITY: Candidate Profile (17855844.pdf)
SUMMARY: Accomplished HR Professional with experience in strategic planning, organizational development, and management of Human Resources business operations. Skilled team leader in attracting qualified talent and providing leadership to multiple sites.
SKILLS: ORGANIZATIONAL DEVELOPMENT, STRATEGIC PLANNING, TALENT MANAGEMENT, CHANGE MANAGEMENT, EMPLOYEE RELATIONS (ER), TRAINING & DEVELOPMENT, PERFORMANCE MANAGEMENT, HR INFORMATION SYSTEMS (HRIS), MS WORD, POWERPOINT, EXCEL, ACCESS AND PUBLISHER, ADobe Illustrator, SAP, ORACLE, CERIDIAN, KRONOS

SOURCE: 17855844.pdf
JOB TITLE: HR MANAGER
COMPANY: COMPANY NAME
DATES: 03/2013 - CURRENT
DESCRIPTION: Managed HR and Employee Relations for Customer Ops at DCA and LGA. Partnered with legal to create ADA and Religious accommodation training. Reduced outstanding ADA cases from 25 to zero in three months.

SOURCE: 17855844.pdf
JOB TITLE: HUMAN RESOURCES CONSULTANT
COMPANY: COMPANY NAME, CITY, STATE
DATES: 06/2005 - 10/2012
DESCRIPTION: Consulted and coached operations staff. Managed performance reviews and talent management for 100 restaurants. Developed hiring process for McDonald's 'Wow' Crew Orientation.

SOURCE: 17855844.pdf
JOB TITLE: HUMAN RESOURCES MANAGER
COMPANY: COMPANY NAME, CITY, STATE
DATES: 03/2001 - 06/2005
DESCRIPTION: Headed HR department. Orchestrated culture change initiative and improved retention by 75%. Grew professional education program from a few sessions to over 50 annually.
